candidate_definition_hints.text: The OCR approach is rephrased as Segmentation Transformer: https://arxiv.org/abs/1909.11065. This is an official implementation of semantic segmentation for HRNet. https://arxiv.org/abs/1908.07919
- This is the implementation for HRNet + OCR.
